description: Updated `Aspire.Hosting.Foundry` hosted-agent builder APIs to use a project-first approach: `AsHostedAgent` now takes the Foundry project as the primary argument with a typed `HostedAgentConfiguration` callback. Protocol selection is now supported so agents can be configured to use either the responses or invocations protocol in both local and Azure publish modes. Local run mode no longer creates an unnecessary default Azure Container Registry resource.
name: Foundry hosted-agent builder API updates
